What entities are present and what are they doing?
canonical_answer: Five women stand on a colorful studio stage featuring hexagonal wall panels. A woman in a black top and maroon leggings stands center on a blue mat, demonstrating a neck massage. She forms a V-shape with her thumb and index finger. To her left, a woman in a white lab coat stands observing. To her right, a woman in a purple top holds an orange card. Korean text instructions for lymph circulation exercises appear at the bottom.
